name: SCC_CM_SLAC_Parm_Cnf
title: SCC_CM_SLAC_Parm_Cnf
syntax: void SCC_CM_SLAC_Parm_Cnf ( byte RunId[], byte SourceMacAddress[], dword NumSounds, dword TimeOut, byte ForwardingSTA[] )
description: The callback is called as soon as a CM_SLAC_Parm.Cnf message is received. Further details that are transmitted in this request can be queried with the following functions:

parameters.name: RunId
parameters.description: Random Run Identifier of sender (8 byte).

parameters.name: NumSounds
parameters.description: Number of M-Sounds to be transmitted.

parameters.name: TimeOut
parameters.description: Timeout for transmission of M-Sounds in multiple of 100ms.

parameters.name: ForwardingSTA
parameters.description: MAC address where the measurement results shall be sent to.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
